title: Glorified Aether
description: Adding a new & crunchier look for the Aether! - Included in Deep Aether as optional assets!
body:
# Glorified Aether
![Golden Oak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1KcZDUrl/images/4b9570751b0cc7d9af893e1cd11ae3421f595717.png)
## What's this?
_Glorified Aether_ is a pack of texture remakes for [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) mod. It aims to add a crunchier, more defined and softer look to the dimension, while not changing it drastically since most changes are concentrated on items. Don't be afraid of changing your Aether experience with this pack! 

## What do I need?

For _Glorified Aether_ to work, you'll need its base mod, "[The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)", by TheAetherTeam. 

## Credits

Texture pack by Aethyus. Credits to the original [Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) mod creators ([TheAetherTeam](https://modrinth.com/organization/the-aether-team)) for base textures. The pack is also known as "Deep Aether Optional Assets", included in the [Deep Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether) addon for The Aether. This means it is of no use to download this pack if you enable the Deep Aether Optional Assets.
